videos.title: The Complete Guide To Making UGC Ads - Every Step From Creative Brief to Final Ad
videos.description:
It’s not the Creative Strategist’s job to make ads.
Their job is to make sure the right ads get made.

And in this video, you'll go through the full ad production cycle — from briefing UGC creators to filming to delivering the final Meta ad — so you know exactly what it takes to run the process like a pro Creative Strategist.

Alysha will start by sharing what she looks for in creators and how to find the right one for your brand. Then she’ll break down what she includes in her creator briefs ac
